title: Home
text:
Hi, I’m Anastasia Soukhov, a PhD in Geography from McMaster University with a background in transportation and civil engineering.
This is a home for my research. Currently, I’m a Postdoctoral Associate at Western University in Ontario, Canada working with the Human Environments Analysis Laboratory. My research focuses on:

Accessibility and spatial interaction modeling
Built environment and transportation
Social inequities and sustainability
Open science

Learn more About Me,my Publications, and Research Highlights on this little site.

title: About Me
text: I am a researcher in Geography, interested in sustainable urban systems, transportation, and social equity. I use R, GIS, and spatial analysis methods to explore how built environments function and how to make them more equitable.
